title: Sentence Builder
subtitle: Put the Hindi words in the right order
question: Build the Hindi sentence
tip: Hindi puts the verb at the very end. The order is usually who, then what, then the action. A postposition like ko, mein, se or par always sits right after the noun it belongs to.

items.hindi: main ja raha hoon
items.english: I am going (male speaker)

items.hindi: woh chai peeta hai
items.english: He drinks tea

items.hindi: main paani peeti hoon
items.english: I drink water (female speaker)

items.hindi: hum ghar jaate hain
items.english: We go home

items.hindi: woh khana khata hai
items.english: He eats food

items.hindi: main hindi seekhti hoon
items.english: I learn Hindi (female speaker)

items.hindi: tum kaam karte ho
items.english: You do work

items.hindi: woh kitaab padhti hai
items.english: She reads a book

items.hindi: main yahan rehta hoon
items.english: I live here (male speaker)

items.hindi: bachche khel rahe hain
items.english: The children are playing

items.hindi: woh gaana gaati hai
items.english: She sings a song

items.hindi: main chai banata hoon
items.english: I make tea (male speaker)

items.hindi: main har shaam mandir jaata hoon
items.english: I go to the temple every evening (male speaker)

items.hindi: woh apne dost ko bulati hai
items.english: She calls her friend

items.hindi: main har subah doodh peeta hoon
items.english: I drink milk every morning (male speaker)

items.hindi: hum kal film dekhne jaayenge
items.english: We will go to watch a movie tomorrow

items.hindi: woh apni behen ko kahani sunati hai
items.english: She tells a story to her sister

items.hindi: main apni maa ko phone karti hoon
items.english: I call my mother (female speaker)

items.hindi: tum apni maa ko phool doge
items.english: You will give flowers to your mother

items.hindi: woh roz subah chai banati hai
items.english: She makes tea every morning

items.hindi: main apne dost ko kitaab deta hoon
items.english: I give a book to my friend (male speaker)

items.hindi: hum park mein cricket khelte hain
items.english: We play cricket in the park

items.hindi: woh apne papa ko chitthi likhta hai
items.english: He writes a letter to his father

items.hindi: main raat ko jaldi so jaati hoon
items.english: I fall asleep early at night (female speaker)

items.hindi: main roz shaam ko apne dost se milta hoon
items.english: I meet my friend every evening (male speaker)

items.hindi: woh apne bhai ke saath bazaar jaata hai
items.english: He goes to the market with his brother

items.hindi: hum agle hafte naani ke ghar jaayenge
items.english: We will go to grandmother's house next week

items.hindi: main apni behen ko ek tohfa deti hoon
items.english: I give my sister a gift (female speaker)

items.hindi: woh subah uthkar garam paani peeta hai
items.english: He wakes up in the morning and drinks warm water

items.hindi: main office se ghar paidal aata hoon
items.english: I come home from the office on foot (male speaker)

items.hindi: bachche skool ke baad park mein khelte hain
items.english: The children play in the park after school

items.hindi: woh apne papa ke liye chai banati hai
items.english: She makes tea for her father

items.hindi: main itwar ko ghar ki safai karta hoon
items.english: I clean the house on Sunday (male speaker)

items.hindi: hum chhutti mein pahaadon par ghoomne jaate hain
items.english: We go to roam in the mountains during the holidays

items.hindi: woh apne kamre mein baithkar kitaab padhta hai
items.english: He sits in his room and reads a book

items.hindi: main apne dost ke ghar khana khane jaati hoon
items.english: I go to my friend's house to eat food (female speaker)
